series_metadata.series_title: LIST OF VENDORS LICENSED TO ENGAGE IN MAKING RETAIL SALES
series_metadata.series_description: Summary of vendor''s licenses issued by each county auditor for each week. Form ST-4.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retained until application for all vendors listed on the summary have been received. Then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain until application for all vendors listed on the summary have been received., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
